title: MedPanel Classification Output
description: Structured output of the classifier agent (Haiku). Based on QUESTION-CLASSIFICATION.md. Produces the 3-axis classification + complexity subscores that drive specialist selection, model tier assignment, and budget allocation. All enums via $ref to shared-definitions.json.

organ_systems.description: Ordered by relevance. First = primary domain = lead specialist. 1-5 domains.

diagnostic_uncertainty.description: How ambiguous is the clinical picture? 0 = crystal clear, 10 = completely unclear.

treatment_conflict.description: Do conditions/medications create competing treatment considerations? 0 = no conflicts, 10 = severe conflicts.

reasoning_brief.description: One sentence explaining the classification logic. Required for audit trail.

complexity_score.description: Computed from the 5-factor formula in QUESTION-CLASSIFICATION.md Section 2. May be computed server-side from the subscores rather than by the LLM.

specialists_selected.description: Selected panel after applying DOMAIN_TO_SPECIALIST mapping, cross-domain rules, and MAX_SPECIALISTS cap. Internist is always first.

model_assignment.description: Maps each specialist to their model tier. Based on complexity score thresholds.

secondary_domains.description: Domains that are relevant but not primary. Influences evidence queries but may not add a specialist.

emergency_detected.description: If true, classification is aborted and the safety system takes over.

emergency_response.description: If emergency_detected, the immediate response shown to user.

safety_system_flags.description: Flags carried forward from the safety pre-check. The classifier cannot downgrade urgency below these.

routing_modifiers.description: Patient context modifiers that influence routing. From QUESTION-CLASSIFICATION.md Section 3.

polypharmacy.description: True when active medications >= 6. Forces clinical_pharmacologist.

geriatric.description: True when age >= 65. May add geriatrician.

pregnancy.description: True when active pregnancy detected. Forces obstetrician.

narrow_therapeutic_index.description: True when patient takes warfarin, lithium, digoxin, etc.

budget_tier.description: Assigned budget based on complexity_score. Simple: 0.0-2.5 ($5), Moderate: 2.6-6.5 ($15), Complex: 6.6-10.0 ($25).
